Product Overview - Canva Brief

Canva design brief for the HeyZack product overview deck

Canva Design Brief: HeyZack Product Overview Deck

Project Overview

Project: Product Overview Deck Client: HeyZack Slides: 10 Format: 16:9 (1920x1080) Style: Clean, informative, product-focused

Brand Kit

Colors

NameHexUsage
Primary Blue#243984Headlines, trust elements
Primary Pink#E82F89CTAs, accents, highlights
Black#2E2D2CBody text
Light Grey#E9EDEFCard backgrounds
White#FFFFFFPage backgrounds
Gradient#243984 → #E82F89Title/closing slides

Typography

ElementFontWeightSize
HeadlinesPoppins or InterBold48-64px
SubheadsPoppins or InterSemiBold32-40px
BodyInterRegular18-24px
Data/StatsPoppinsExtraBold72-120px
CaptionsInterRegular14-16px

Logo

  • Primary: Stylized pink “Z” mark
  • Wordmark: “HeyZack” in brand blue
  • Placement: Top-left corner or centered on title/closing slides
  • Clear space: Minimum 20px around logo

Slide Specifications

Slide 1: Title Slide

Template: Hero with gradient background Background: Linear gradient #243984 → #E82F89 (135°) Content:

  • Logo: Centered, white version
  • Headline: “HeyZack Product Ecosystem” (64px, white, bold)
  • Subhead: “128 Products. 15 Categories. One Platform.” (32px, white) Decorative: Subtle circuit/network pattern overlay (5% opacity)

Slide 2: Product Philosophy

Template: Statement slide Background: White Content:

  • Headline: “Complete Control. One System.” (48px, #243984)
  • Body: “Every device designed to work together seamlessly—from lighting to climate to security.” (24px, #2E2D2C)
  • 3 philosophy pillars:
    • “Interoperability” (icon: network)
    • “Simplicity” (icon: sparkle)
    • “Intelligence” (icon: brain) Visual: Subtle product ecosystem image on right (40%)

Slide 3: Ecosystem Overview

Template: Data grid Background: Light grey (#F8FAFC) Content:

  • Headline: “The Complete Ecosystem” (48px, #243984)
  • Large stat: “128” — Products Total
  • 8 category icons with counts:
    • Climate (14) | Security (19) | Energy (12) | Lighting (18)
    • Access (13) | Sensors (13) | Curtains (29) | Gateways (4) Styling: Icons in brand blue, numbers in pink

Slide 4: Climate Control (14 Products)

Template: Product category Background: White Content:

  • Headline: “Climate Control” (48px, #243984)
  • Subhead: “14 Products for Perfect Comfort”
  • Product grid (4 featured items):
    • Smart Thermostat
    • Radiator Valve
    • IR Remote
    • Temperature Sensor Visual: Product photos in clean grid Feature callout: “20-30% energy savings”

Slide 5: Security (19 Products)

Template: Product category Background: Light grey (#F8FAFC) Content:

  • Headline: “Security” (48px, #243984)
  • Subhead: “19 Products for Peace of Mind”
  • Product grid (4 featured items):
    • Video Doorbell
    • Indoor Camera
    • Outdoor Camera
    • Motion Sensor Visual: Product photos with security icons Feature callout: “24/7 monitoring ready”

Slide 6: Energy Management (12 Products)

Template: Product category Background: White Content:

  • Headline: “Energy Management” (48px, #243984)
  • Subhead: “12 Products for Efficiency”
  • Product grid (4 featured items):
    • Smart Breaker
    • Energy Monitor
    • Smart Plug
    • Load Controller Visual: Product photos with energy icons Feature callout: “Real-time consumption tracking”

Slide 7: Lighting (18 Products)

Template: Product category Background: Light grey (#F8FAFC) Content:

  • Headline: “Lighting” (48px, #243984)
  • Subhead: “18 Products for Ambiance”
  • Product grid (4 featured items):
    • Smart Dimmer
    • LED Driver
    • RGB Controller
    • Scene Switch Visual: Product photos showing lighting effects Feature callout: “Voice & app control”

Slide 8: Additional Categories

Template: Multi-category grid Background: White Content:

  • Headline: “More Categories” (48px, #243984)
  • 4-up grid:
    • Access Control (13 products) — Smart locks, keypad entry
    • Sensors (13 products) — Motion, door/window, environmental
    • Curtains & Shades (29 products) — Motors, controllers, tracks
    • Gateways (4 products) — Zigbee, WiFi, Matter hubs Visual: Representative product for each category

Slide 9: Connectivity

Template: Tech specs Background: Light grey (#F8FAFC) Content:

  • Headline: “Universal Connectivity” (48px, #243984)
  • Protocol support icons:
    • Zigbee 3.0 (primary)
    • WiFi (select devices)
    • Matter (future ready)
    • Thread (future ready)
  • App features:
    • iOS & Android
    • Voice assistant integration
    • Cloud & local control Visual: Connectivity diagram showing protocols

Slide 10: Contact / CTA

Template: CTA slide Background: Linear gradient #243984 → #E82F89 (135°) Content:

  • Headline: “Build Your Smart Space” (48px, white)
  • Subhead: “Contact us for product catalogs and pricing” (24px, white)
  • Contact info:
    • sales@heyzack.ai
    • heyzack.ai/products
  • Logo: White version, centered at bottom CTA: “Request Product Catalog” button

Design Guidelines

Layout

  • Margins: 80px all sides
  • Grid: 12-column for flexibility
  • Alignment: Left-align body, center headlines

Product Photography

  • Clean white backgrounds
  • Consistent lighting and angles
  • High resolution (min 1000x1000px)
  • Show key features clearly

Hierarchy

  1. Category name (largest, brand blue)
  2. Product count (accent, pink)
  3. Product names (medium, black)
  4. Descriptions (smaller, grey)
